file.content:
name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1

jobs:
  test:
    name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Rust toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: rustfmt, clippy

      - name: Cache cargo registry
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry/index/
            ~/.cargo/registry/cache/
            ~/.cargo/git/db/
            target/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-

      - name: Check formatting
        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check

      - name: Clippy
        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --all-targets

      - name: Test
        run: cargo test --all-targets

      - name: Doctest
        run: cargo test --doc

  test-bubblewrap:
    name: Test (bubblewrap)
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Rust toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Cache cargo registry
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry/index/
            ~/.cargo/registry/cache/
            ~/.cargo/git/db/
            target/
          key: ubuntu-latest-cargo-bwrap-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ubuntu-latest-cargo-bwrap-
            ubuntu-latest-cargo-

      - name: Install bubblewrap
        run: sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y bubblewrap

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --all-targets

      - name: Test (with bubblewrap)
        run: cargo test --all-targets

      - name: Doctest
        run: cargo test --doc

file.content:
[package]
name = "yokushi"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
description = "AI agent hook tool that suppresses specific tool/command usage based on YAML rules"
license = "MIT"

[[bin]]
name = "yokushi"
path = "src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
serde_yml = "0.0.12"
regex = "1"
clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive"] }
anyhow = "1"

[dev-dependencies]
assert_cmd = "2"
predicates = "3"

content.text: yokushiにはbubblewrap固有の機能はないため、`test-bubblewrap`ジョブは不要です。`.github`ディレクトリを作成してファイルを追加します。

input.content:
version: 2
updates:
  - package-ecosystem: "cargo"
    directory: "/"
    schedule:
      interval: "daily"
    cooldown:
      default-days: 2

name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1

jobs:
  test:
    name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Rust toolchain
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          components: rustfmt, clippy

      - name: Cache cargo registry
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cargo/registry/index/
            ~/.cargo/registry/cache/
            ~/.cargo/git/db/
            target/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-

      - name: Check formatting
        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check

      - name: Clippy
        run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings

      - name: Build
        run: cargo build --all-targets

      - name: Test
        run: cargo test --all-targets

      - name: Doctest
        run: cargo test --doc

content.text: 作成されました。内容を確認します。

以下の2ファイルを追加しました：

**`.github/dependabot.yml`** — Cargoの依存関係を毎日チェック（2日クールダウン）

**`.github/workflows/ci.yml`** — PRがmainにマージされる際に実行：
- `ubuntu-latest` / `macos-latest` のマトリクスビルド
- `cargo fmt` フォーマットチェック
- `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` 静的解析
- `cargo build` ビルド
- `cargo test` テスト（doctestを含む）
- Cargoレジストリのキャッシュ

oxsbの`test-bubblewrap`ジョブはbubblewrap固有の機能を使うため、yokushiには含めていません。
